goal: Audit public Amazon search result pages for 140W USB-C GaN chargers suitable for simultaneously fast-charging a MacBook Air M4 and iPhone 17 Pro Max. Capture screenshots, visible product titles, prices, seller/fulfillment text when visible, ratings, port counts, and any visible power-distribution claims. Do not buy, add to cart, sign in, post, or perform customer actions. Report only browser-visible evidence and clearly mark blocked or unavailable pages.
